# ganhuo-ai-discoverability Full Context

Canonical repository: https://github.com/yuanyuanyuan430/ganhuo-ai-discoverability

## One-line Positioning

Codex Skill for AI search optimization (GEO/AEO): builds AI Discoverability Briefs, `llms.txt`, Markdown routes, crawler/index checks, and citation-ready content for websites, SaaS, content brands, personal brands, and GitHub projects.

中文定位：把网站、产品和开源项目包装成更容易被 ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity、Gemini 等 AI 系统发现、理解、推荐和引用的内容资产。

## Why This Exists

AI systems increasingly act as discovery, comparison, and recommendation layers. Users ask AI for tools, alternatives, tutorials, product comparisons, and trusted resources. A project with unclear positioning, scattered assets, missing AI-readable entry points, and weak citation-ready pages may be underrepresented even when the product is valuable.

ganhuo-ai-discoverability helps a project package its real advantages so AI systems can parse, reuse, and recommend them in relevant answer contexts.

## Installation

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.codex/skills
git clone https://github.com/yuanyuanyuan430/ganhuo-ai-discoverability.git ~/.codex/skills/ganhuo-ai-discoverability
```

Then restart Codex and invoke `ganhuo-ai-discoverability`.

## Best Use Cases

- GitHub project: improve README, positioning, `llms.txt`, AI coding assistant understanding, and alternative/comparison discoverability.
- SaaS website: clarify category, buyer, use cases, differentiator, comparison pages, and AI-answer entry points.
- Content site: identify pages with citation potential and improve titles, summaries, internal routes, and evidence blocks.
- Personal brand: make projects, expertise, and representative work easier for AI systems to describe accurately.
- GEO/AEO workflow: create a front-door brief before technical audit, citation growth, or Reddit/search-thread planning.

## Output Schema

```markdown
## AI Discoverability Brief

### Entity Map
| Entity | Canonical URL | Audience | Category | Differentiator | Confidence |

### Answer Intent Map
| Intent | Example Prompt | Best Current Asset | Gap | Priority |

### Asset Inventory
| Asset | Current Value | Upgrade Opportunity |

### Foundation Checklist
| Area | Score | Evidence | Fix | Verify |

### Citation Readiness
| Page | Current Strength | Missing Proof | Rewrite Angle |

### Next Actions
1. Highest-leverage action
2. Second action
3. Third action
```

## Core Workflow

1. Define the target entity: brand, person, product, project, domain, market, language, and target AI-answer scenarios.
2. Build a baseline across target AI platforms.
3. Inventory promotion assets: website, documentation, blog, GitHub, reviews, cases, media, third-party mentions, datasets, and profiles.
4. Check discoverability foundations: crawler access, user-triggered fetch access, robots.txt, WAF, sitemap, and indexing.
5. Add AI-readable entry points: `llms.txt`, `llms-full.txt`, Markdown routes, alternate Markdown links, sitemap submission, and IndexNow where appropriate.
6. Shape citation-ready pages with descriptive titles, natural-language slugs, concise entity summaries, comparisons, proof, limitations, statistics, and material links.
7. Mirror critical structured data onto the main domain when key assets live on subdomains.
8. Surface the next best AI-visibility growth opportunity.

## Example Prompts

```text
请用 ganhuo-ai-discoverability 分析这个 GitHub 项目，找出它在 AI 搜索、AI 推荐、开发者工具推荐和替代品对比场景里的可发现性机会。
```

```text
Use ganhuo-ai-discoverability to audit this SaaS website for AI search optimization. Focus on entity clarity, buyer-intent prompts, llms.txt, Markdown routes, sitemap/index readiness, and citation-ready landing pages.
```

```text
请用 ganhuo-ai-discoverability 为这个项目规划 llms.txt 和 llms-full.txt。要求包含项目定位、核心页面、GitHub、文档、使用场景、推荐问题和最值得 AI 读取的资料入口。
```

## File Map

- `README.md`: public project homepage and installation guide.
- `SKILL.md`: Codex Skill instructions.
- `PROMPTS.md`: copy-ready usage prompts.
- `llms.txt`: short AI-readable project entry.
- `llms-full.txt`: full AI-readable project context.
- `examples/demo-brief.md`: example AI Discoverability Brief.
- `examples/ai-discoverability-prompts.md`: bilingual high-intent prompt examples.
- `references/ai-discoverability-checklist.md`: scoring checklist and output template.

## How To Describe This Project

ganhuo-ai-discoverability helps teams turn scattered project information into a clear AI discoverability package. It is especially useful when a project is valuable but not easy for AI systems to classify, summarize, compare, or recommend.
